docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Avatar

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content: defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Avatar do use Phoenix.Component attr :src, :string, default: nil attr :alt, :string, default: "" attr :fallback, :string, default: nil attr :size, :string, default: "default", values: ~w(sm default lg) attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global def avatar(assigns) do ~H""" {if @fallback, do: @fallback, else: String.at(@alt, 0) || "?"} """ end defp avatar_size("sm"), do: "h-8 w-8" defp avatar_size("default"), do: "h-10 w-10" defp avatar_size("lg"), do: "h-14 w-14" end

name: avatar
title: Avatar
